name: Termite Control
description: Comprehensive termite inspections, soil treatments, and baiting systems to protect your property's structure.

faqs.question: How often should I get a termite inspection?
faqs.answer: We recommend professional inspections at least once a year to catch infestations before structural damage occurs.

faqs.question: How long do termite treatments last?
faqs.answer: Liquid chemical barriers typically last 5 to 8 years, while baiting systems require annual maintenance.

name: Bed Bug Treatment
description: Advanced thermal heat treatments and chemical treatments to eliminate bed bugs from homes and businesses.

faqs.question: Should I throw away my mattress if I have bed bugs?
faqs.answer: No, our heat treatments completely eliminate bed bugs from mattresses and box springs without requiring disposal.

name: Rodent Control & Exclusion
description: Effective rodent trapping, baiting, and structural entry-point sealing to prevent rat and mouse infestations.

faqs.question: How do you keep mice from coming back?
faqs.answer: We perform complete rodent exclusion, sealing all foundation cracks, vents, and utility gaps wider than 1/4 inch.
